name: Maliss in the Mirror
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｍ∀ＬＩＣＥ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マリス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＩＮ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＴＨＥ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＭＩＲＲＯＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ミラー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; banish 1 "Maliss" monster from your hand or face-up field, and if you do, negate that monster's effects until the end of this turn. If this card is banished: You can target 1 "Maliss" card in your GY; banish it, and if you do, add 1 "Maliss" card of the same type (Monster, Spell, or Trap) from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Maliss in the Mirror" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; banish 1 "Maliss" monster from your hand or face-up field, and if you do, negate that monster's effects until the end of this turn. If this card is banished: You can target 1 "Maliss" card in your GY; banish it, and if you do, add 1 "Maliss" card of the same type (Monster, Spell, or Trap) from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Maliss in the Mirror" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
